backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for a salon app that handles booking submissions (open to all), admin-only booking retrieval with access control, and a public salon info query. Uses blob storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all price values, currency symbols, and 'From $...' text were removed from frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx while preserving layout and styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a #root div and loading the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Navigation, Hero, Services, Pricing, Gallery, BookingContact, Footer) and conditionally renders the AdminDashboard overlay via URL param or state toggle.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Full-screen admin overlay with PIN authentication (default: 1234) that fetches and displays all salon bookings in a styled table/card layout using gold and charcoal theming.
Reusable scroll-triggered animation wrapper using IntersectionObserver to apply directional entrance animations (up, left, right, zoom) with configurable delay and element type.
frontend/src/components/BookingContact.t: Two-column booking section with a 6-field form that submits to the backend, shows a confirmation state with a WhatsApp CTA pre-filled with booking details, and displays contact info and quick WhatsApp booking panel.
frontend/src/components/FloatingActionBu: Fixed floating action buttons for Instagram, WhatsApp, and phone call, using the salon's specific URLs and phone number with hover scale animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with salon branding, social media links (Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook), quick navigation links, and contact/address information with smooth-scroll navigation handlers.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Displays a responsive image grid of 21 salon photos with animated entrance effects and a lightbox component for full-screen image browsing with keyboard and click navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with an auto-advancing image slideshow, animated headline/CTA buttons, and links to booking, services, WhatsApp, and Instagram.
frontend/src/components/InstagramGallery: Displays a 12-image Instagram-style grid with hover overlays linking to the salon's Instagram profile, accompanied by animated section headers.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: Full-screen image lightbox modal supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Escape), prev/next buttons, a counter, and dot indicators for a given image array.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Animated loading screen with a spinning ring, salon branding, and a progress bar that completes over ~3.2 seconds before fading out and calling an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Displays the salon's location section with an embedded Google Map, address, phone number, and business hours, along with a 'Get Directions' button.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, active section tracking, Instagram link, phone number, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Renders a service menu grid organized by category (haircuts, color, nails, etc.) with item names but no prices, displayed over a dimmed background image.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of salon service cards, each with an image, icon, name, and description, with hover animations and staggered entrance effects.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Auto-advancing testimonial carousel showing client reviews with star ratings, navigation arrows, dot indicators, and a 6-second auto-play interval.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small button component that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching salon info, retrieving all bookings, and submitting new bookings via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, returning a ref and visibility state for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system including light/dark mode color tokens (gold, charcoal, cream, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts, oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the salon UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the luxury salon website's features, architectural decisions, known issues, and versioned feature list for Imagine Unisex Salon.
